CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2007 Continued To Aug-28-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Inspection Demand And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. (1) Defendant John Kelly, U Street Lounge's Motion To Compel Response To Inspection Demand is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $320, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. (2) Defendant John Kelly, U Street Lounge's Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $250, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
